name: groundwork-marketplace
description: A curated collection of Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: groundwork
plugins.description: Comprehensive skills library: planning, design, TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques. 24 skills, 14 agents, 18 commands.

plugins.name: wonk
plugins.description: Structure-aware code search — ranked, deduplicated results optimized for LLM agents.

plugins.name: bells-and-whistles
plugins.description: Play notification sounds and voice announcements when Claude Code stops or needs attention. 8 sound themes, US/UK accents, 4 voices, mute/unmute per-tab or globally.
